_comment: Spoken message presets (streamed as TTS to the horn). Editable in-app. Sound effects are files in sounds/.

tts.label: Get Off My Lawn
tts.text: Attention. You are on private property. Please leave immediately.

tts.label: Intruder Alert
tts.text: Warning. Intruder detected. The police have been notified. Leave the property now.

tts.label: You're Being Recorded
tts.text: You are being recorded. Smile for the camera.

tts.label: No Soliciting
tts.text: No soliciting. Please do not knock or ring the doorbell.

tts.label: Leave the Package
tts.text: Please leave the package at the front door. Thank you.

tts.label: Welcome
tts.text: Welcome. Please come to the front door.

tts.label: Kids, Come Inside
tts.text: Hey kids, time to come inside.

tts.label: Beware of Dog
tts.text: Warning. There is a dog on the premises. Do not enter the yard.

tts.label: No Barking (Neighbor)
tts.text: Attention neighbor. Your dog has been barking non-stop. Please bring your dog inside and keep it quiet. Thank you.

tts.label: Thank You
tts.text: Thank you. Have a great day.
